name: action-buttons
description: Manifest-declared action buttons plus an admin page that renames them at runtime via a custom API backed by plugin config.

actions.title: Owncast
actions.description: Visit the Owncast project home page

actions.title: About this stream
actions.description: An action that opens an inline HTML modal instead of navigating to a URL
actions.html:
About this stream

Action buttons can embed inline HTML for short notices, contact info, schedules, or anything else that doesn't need a separate page.

This snippet came from a plugin's manifest.actions[].html field.
